notes: #once grants at most one invocation and consumes that call right. A repeatable callable may satisfy a once parameter, but a once value cannot satisfy a repeatable requirement.
Ordinary sequences expose logical indices 1..length. Storage offsets remain internal zero-based values; negative-from-end rewriting is forbidden.
Stable: def f(...) = return expr is shorthand for a function block containing return expr.

display_name: Option and Result cases use enum double-colon case surface
notes: Option cases use `Option<T>::some` and `Option<T>::none`; Result cases use `Result<T, error E>::ok` and `Result<T, error E>::err`. Expected-type shorthand may omit only the leading nominal type, never the `error` role in a Result type argument. Bare and dot-case aliases are rejected.

`[e1, ...]` constructs immutable `List<T>`. Context-free inference requires nonempty identical independently normalized element types. A fixed `List<T>` context requires normalized-type identity except that an unsuffixed integer may adapt to exact in-range `IntN`/`UIntN`; no NumericArray rewrite or heterogeneous join exists.
downcastOwned returns OwnedDowncast<Target, Source> with matched(Target) or unmatched(Source); failure never destroys or hides the original owner and does not misuse ErrorSet as an owner channel.
